title: the red bull  Apocalypse
description:
a mod to make minecraft unplayable
good luck!
i reccomend creative
body:
a mod that adds new weapons, new armor, new blocks, and new sctructures!
it adds stuff like:
sans undertale,
banana armor,
fried hot dogs,
walmart

some new weapons include
hand,
gaster blaster,
banana sword

some new blocks are
silverfish ore,
poisonous potato blocks,
quartzore (overworld),
wii,
apple maker 2000

and some new armor is
yellowbanana,
silverfish

and finally, some new dimensions & structures
vr dimensions, chickfala structure, cinnamon toast crunch dimension, and spamton's dumpster structure
also if you make red bull in a brewing stand,  it causes you to launch into the air, explode the ground beneath you, and starting spawning portals and mobs. 
for 1.19.4  and 1.201.1 forge
made in mcreator
